original_abstract: As manmade climate change threatens the health of the planet, it is important that we understand and address the contribution of healthcare to global emissions. Medical imaging is a signiﬁcant contributor to overall emissions. This article aims to highlight key issues and examples of sustainable practices, in order to empower radiologists to make a change within their department.
humanized_abstract: With the increasing effects of man-made climate change, we are all invited to consider the role that healthcare plays in this phenomenon and how we can aﬀect improvements. A very relevant issue to consider is the contribution of medical imaging to total emissions and this article attempts to identiﬁes some of the challenges and provide examples of practical actions radiologists can perform to inspire change within their department.
